name: gbrain
description: Personal knowledge brain with hybrid RAG search — GStack mod for agent platforms

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Route content to specialized ingestion skills. Detects input type and delegates.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using 3-layer search, synthesis, and citation propagation

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Brain health checks: back-link enforcement, citation audit, filing validation, stale info, orphans, benchmarks

skills.name: enrich
skills.description: Enrich pages with tiered enrichment protocol, person/company page templates, and validation rules

skills.name: briefing
skills.description: Compile daily briefing with meeting context, active deals, and citation tracking

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Universal migration from Obsidian, Notion, Logseq, markdown, CSV, JSON, Roam

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Set up GBrain: auto-provision Supabase or PGLite, AGENTS.md injection, first import

skills.name: publish
skills.description: Share brain pages as beautiful password-protected HTML (code + skill pair, zero LLM calls)

skills.name: frontmatter-guard
skills.description: Validate and auto-repair YAML frontmatter on brain pages; gates against malformed YAML, missing closing ---, nested quotes, slug mismatches, null bytes

skills.name: signal-detector
skills.description: Always-on ambient signal capture. Fires on every message to detect original thinking and entity mentions.

skills.name: brain-ops
skills.description: Brain-first lookup, read-enrich-write loop, source attribution, ambient enrichment. The core read/write cycle.

skills.name: idea-ingest
skills.description: Ingest links, articles, tweets, and ideas into the brain with analysis and entity cross-linking.

skills.name: media-ingest
skills.description: Ingest video, audio, PDF, book, screenshot, and repo content with entity extraction.

skills.name: meeting-ingestion
skills.description: Ingest meeting transcripts with attendee enrichment, entity propagation, and timeline merge.

skills.name: citation-fixer
skills.description: Audit and fix citation formatting across brain pages.

skills.name: repo-architecture
skills.description: Where new brain files go. Filing rules and directory conventions.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create new skills following the conformance standard with MECE validation.

skills.name: daily-task-manager
skills.description: Task lifecycle: add, complete, defer, remove, review with priority levels.

skills.name: daily-task-prep
skills.description: Morning preparation with calendar context, open threads, and task review.

skills.name: cross-modal-review
skills.description: Quality gate via second model with refusal routing chain.

skills.name: cron-scheduler
skills.description: Schedule management with staggering, quiet hours, and wake-up override.

skills.name: reports
skills.description: Save and load timestamped reports with keyword routing for fast lookup.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Skill validation framework: frontmatter, sections, manifest coverage, MECE checks.

skills.name: soul-audit
skills.description: 6-phase interactive interview generating SOUL.md, USER.md, ACCESS_POLICY.md, HEARTBEAT.md.

skills.name: webhook-transforms
skills.description: Convert external events into brain-ingestible signals with entity extraction.

skills.name: data-research
skills.description: Structured data research: search, extract, archive, deduplicate, track. Parameterized YAML recipes for investor updates, donations, company metrics.

skills.name: daily-digest
skills.description: Morning digest of yesterday's RBrain activity, delivered to Discord.

skills.name: heavy-file-ingestion
skills.description: Convert heavyweight files (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX) into cheap artifacts with a tiered escalation model.

skills.name: weekly-signal-diff
skills.description: Weekly structural diff on fast-moving markets, personalized via RBrain context and saved as a durable digest.

skills.name: claudeception
skills.description: Continuous learning system that extracts reusable knowledge from work sessions into new skills.

skills.name: article-learning
skills.description: Deep article analysis tied to Ramy's context. Extracts actionable insights, challenges weak ideas, maps landing spots, and ends with a confirmation gate.

skills.name: article-apply-changes
skills.description: Execute only the article-derived changes Ramy explicitly approved. Applies sequentially, logs the batch, and reports exact slugs and paths touched.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree.

skills.name: prd-to-issues
skills.description: Break a PRD into independently-grabbable GitHub issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices.

skills.name: write-a-prd
skills.description: Create a PRD through user interview, codebase exploration, and module design, then submit as a GitHub issue.

setup.description: Auto-provision Supabase or PGLite and configure GBrain (< 2 min)
